    Classes in net.finmath.finitedifference.interestrate.products that implement FiniteDifferenceInterestRateProduct
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    Bond
    Finite-difference valuation of a deterministic-cashflow bond.
    class 
    OptionOnBond
    Finite-difference valuation of a European option on a deterministic-cashflow bond.
    class 
    Swap
    Finite-difference valuation of a reduced-scope swap.
    class 
    SwapLeg
    Finite-difference valuation of a reduced-scope swap leg.
    class 
    Swaption
    Finite-difference valuation of a swaption under an interest-rate finite-difference model.
    final class 
    Swaption.ResolvedSwaption
    Internal resolved product with model-resolved exercise times.

    Creates a theta-method finite-difference solver for a one-dimensional backward PDE.
